title: Amethyst Netherite Tools
description: Replaces Netherite tools with Amethyst. +CIT Bow
body:
![Amethyst Netherite Tools.](https://i.imgur.com/nGOgnQz.gif)  

✨ Replaces the boring old Netherite tool textures with brand new Amethyst. Ooh, shiny! ✨

## **Features:**
- Retextured Netherite tools and weapons
- CIT Bow

### **FAQ:**

**How do I use this resource pack?**

↳ Place this resource pack **above** all other packs that include tool texture changes. If you're unsure which packs include these, I'd suggest just placing it at the top of your list.

**How do I use the bow texture?**

↳ The bow's texture is CIT (custom item texture) meaning it requires Optifine or another CIT loader to function. Once you have one of those installed, simply rename your favorite bow to "Amethyst Bow" using an anvil.

**Disclaimer: This pack does not require any mods to use the _basic tool_ textures.(ie. sword, shovel, axe, pickaxe, and hoe)**
